text:
2010/10/3 J.R. Oldroyd <fbsd@opal.com>:
> On Sun, 3 Oct 2010 17:10:08 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote=
:
>>
>> Maintainer of sysutils/xfce4-cpugraph-plugin,
>>
>> Please note that PR ports/151174 has just been submitted.
>>
>> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>> and a committer will take care of it.
>>
>> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>> =A0 =A0 http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/151174
>>
>
> Hi Oliver,
>
> Thanks for your port update.
>
> Would you like to take over maintainership of this port, please?
> I am low on time for this at the moment. =A0If so, could you re-submit
> the patch also changing the MAINTAINER line to yourself.
>

Yes for sure.

> Thanks,
> =A0 =A0 =A0 =A0-jr
>
